items.title: From Svedka to Anthropic, brands make bold plays with AI in Super Bowl ads
items.description: From the first AI-generated Big Game ad courtesy of Svedka to Anthropic's beef with OpenAI, here are the biggest ads from Super Bowl LX.

items.title: India has changed its startup rules for deep tech
items.description: India is adjusting startup rules to help more of its deep tech startups with funding and long-term success.

items.title: The kids ‘picked last in gym class’ gear up for Super Bowl
items.description: YouTube CEO Neal Mohan is expected to be there. Apple's Tim Cook, too.

items.title: NBA star Giannis Antetokounmpo joins Kalshi as an investor
items.description: Antetokounmpo is the first NBA player to directly invest in Kalshi.

items.title: New York lawmakers propose a three-year pause on new data centers
items.description: Although the bill’s prospects are uncertain, New York is at least the sixth state to consider pausing construction of new data centers.
